examples: The greater sandhill, another subspecies also present on the Platte, is larger.
James knows some sandhill cranes rest in a small water area in the evening.

This morning a pair of sandhill cranes woke me up with their weird call.
Veryan Heal, from English Heritage, said at the time of the fire Sandhill Park was on its "at risk" register.
